original_query: SELECT "t8"."NAME" FROM (SELECT "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO" AS "f9" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO") AS "t6" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5 AS "f2" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5) AS "t8" ON "t6"."JOB" = "t8"."NAME" AND "t6"."f9" = "t8"."f2" GROUP BY "t8"."NAME"
rewritten_query:
SELECT "t8"."NAME"
FROM (
    SELECT "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO" AS "f9"
    FROM "EMP"
    WHERE "ENAME" = 'A'
    GROUP BY "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO"
) AS "t6"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5 AS "f2"
    FROM "DEPT"
) AS "t8" ON "t6"."JOB" = "t8"."NAME" AND "t6"."f9" = "t8"."f2"
GROUP BY "t8"."NAME"

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Removed redundant GROUP BY clause in the DEPT subquery since DEPTNO is unique, making the GROUP BY on NAME and DEPTNO+5 unnecessary.
